programs.title: Tribunal Justice
programs.desc: In a neighborhood spat, a widow sues her neighbor for unpaid loans her deceased husband provided; she sets the record straight, emphasizing the absence of any romantic involvement between them.

programs.title: Tribunal Justice
programs.desc: A man sues his ex-girlfriend for brake repair costs, doubling the amount due to perceived malice; she says they are even because she supported him during his incarceration.

programs.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programs.sub_title: Did My Boyfriend Abuse My Daughter?
programs.desc: Chevelle isn't comfortable with her boyfriend being around her youngest daughter after he was accused of molesting her; Savana's boyfriend may go to prison for burning her 2-year-old daughter.

programs.title: Karamo
programs.sub_title: Unlock: I Went to Jail, You Went Cheating!; Mom, I'm Not Your Online Bully!
programs.desc: While Johnathan was in jail, he says, he and his fiancée, Natasha, agreed to stay faithful, yet he suspects she hasn't kept her promise; Tamertha says she's being bullied online by her own daughter, Teesiah, and she hopes Karamo can help them repair their broken relationship.

programs.title: Judy Justice
programs.desc: The Judge rules on two cases; two Pit Bulls jump over a fence and maul a neighbor's small dog; the Judge speaks to the responsibility that comes with owning dangerous dog breeds; in the next case, a woman sues a hairstylist.

programs.title: Judy Justice
programs.desc: A dog attack on Christmas day divides neighbors who fight over which of their dogs was the aggressor and who is responsible for vet bills.
